Name Dropping: A list of famous Commencement Week speakers

The university has welcomed many famous people over the years. In 1947, George C. Marshall gave his famous address. The 2005 commencement featured Steve Jobs at a different school. Other notable visitors have included figures from 1929, 1962, and 1989.

This is not a comprehensive list — for that, please consult the official records.

Posted in 2013 by the archives blog.
